umbrella_question: Does your solution incorporate any form of artificial intelligence in your ERP module with the ultimate goal of enhancing operational efficiency/productivity and/or improve decision-making? Some examples follow:

examples.title: Automated Invoice Processing
examples.description: AI-powered OCR extracts vendor, amount, and line-item data from invoices, automatically matches them to purchase orders, and routes for approval, reducing manual data entry.

examples.title: Automated Journal Entry Suggestions
examples.description: AI learns from historical accounting patterns to suggest appropriate account codes, cost-centre allocations, and journal entries for recurring transactions.

examples.title: Anomaly Detection and Fraud Prevention
examples.description: AI monitors transaction patterns in real time to identify unusual activities, duplicate payments, vendor fraud, or accounting errors, flagging suspicious transactions for review.

examples.title: Resume Screening and Ranking
examples.description: AI parses incoming résumés and ranks candidates against a role's competency profile, surfacing the strongest applicants without manual shortlisting.

examples.title: Attrition Risk Forecasting
examples.description: AI analyses workforce signals (tenure, performance, engagement, leave patterns) to flag employees at elevated attrition risk so retention conversations can happen early.

examples.title: Skill-Gap Recommendations
examples.description: AI compares each employee's current skills to their role profile and recommends targeted learning interventions to close measurable gaps.

examples.title: Predictive Lead Scoring
examples.description: AI ranks inbound leads by win probability based on firmographic and behavioural signals, helping sales prioritise the highest-value prospects.

examples.title: Opportunity Win-Probability Modelling
examples.description: AI forecasts deal closure likelihood per opportunity, surfacing pipeline risks and supporting more accurate revenue forecasts.

examples.title: Next-Best-Action Recommendations
examples.description: AI analyses each customer's history and stage to suggest the most effective follow-up action for the rep, improving engagement consistency.

examples.title: Defect Rate Forecasting
examples.description: AI predicts scrap and defect rates from in-process production data, enabling proactive quality interventions before issues cascade downstream.

examples.title: Real-Time Anomaly Detection
examples.description: AI monitors sensor streams from machines and lines, alerting operators to out-of-specification conditions in real time before defects accumulate.

examples.title: Production Optimisation
examples.description: AI analyses historical run data to recommend optimal scheduling, batch sizing, and machine settings that maximise throughput while minimising waste.

examples.title: Demand Forecasting
examples.description: AI generates SKU-level demand forecasts from historical sales, seasonality, and lead times, supporting accurate inventory planning and replenishment decisions.

examples.title: Replenishment Recommendations
examples.description: AI calculates intelligent reorder points and quantities per SKU and location, balancing carrying cost against stockout risk.

examples.title: Stock Anomaly Detection
examples.description: AI identifies unusual consumption patterns, theft indicators, or expiry-driven write-off risks, flagging items for review before they hit financial impact.

examples.title: Predictive Vehicle Maintenance
examples.description: AI analyses telematics, mileage, and fault-code patterns to predict component failures before breakdown, scheduling maintenance during planned downtime.

examples.title: Fuel Anomaly Detection
examples.description: AI flags abnormal fuel consumption and operational efficiency drops per vehicle and driver, surfacing leakage, route inefficiency, or maintenance issues.

examples.title: Optimal Replacement Timing
examples.description: AI models each vehicle's age, condition, maintenance cost trend, and residual value to recommend the economically optimal time to retire and replace.

examples.title: Predictive Maintenance
examples.description: AI analyses condition-monitoring readings (vibration, temperature, current) against historical failure data to predict asset failures before they occur.

examples.title: Spare-Parts Optimisation
examples.description: AI recommends optimal stocking levels per part by analysing demand patterns, lead times, and asset criticality to balance carrying cost against downtime risk.

examples.title: Reliability Pattern Analysis
examples.description: AI identifies recurring failure modes and "bad-actor" assets across the fleet, prioritising root-cause investigations that yield the largest reliability gains.

examples.title: Schedule Optimisation
examples.description: AI optimises technician dispatch to minimise travel time and maximise resource utilisation while honouring SLA commitments and skill requirements.

examples.title: Technician Recommendation
examples.description: AI suggests the best-fit technician for each job based on skills, certifications, proximity, and historical first-time-fix rate.

examples.title: Knowledge-Article Suggestion
examples.description: AI matches incoming fault codes and issue descriptions to the most relevant knowledge articles and resolution paths, accelerating in-field troubleshooting.

examples.title: Effort Estimation
examples.description: AI predicts task duration and effort based on historical project data, scope characteristics, and assigned team composition, improving plan accuracy.

examples.title: Risk Detection
examples.description: AI scans schedule, budget, and resource signals to flag projects drifting toward delivery risk before milestones slip.

examples.title: Resource Allocation Suggestions
examples.description: AI recommends optimal team assignments by matching project skill requirements against resource availability and historical performance.

examples.title: Natural-Language Search
examples.description: AI lets users query ERP data in plain language ("show me overdue invoices over £1,000") and returns matching records without writing reports.

examples.title: Self-Service Chatbot
examples.description: AI answers user questions across the ERP via a conversational interface, with configurable knowledge boundaries and escalation rules.

examples.title: Auto-Generated Record Summaries
examples.description: AI produces concise summaries of customer history, project status, or document overviews to accelerate decision-making and onboarding.
